assertions.text: Runs git status and git diff to scan changes
assertions.evidence: Phase 1 explicitly runs git status, git diff, and git diff --staged

assertions.text: Runs ruff check and ruff format for Python lint
assertions.evidence: Phase 3 runs 'uv run ruff check app/ --fix' and 'uv run ruff format app/'

assertions.text: Runs ty check for Python type checking
Runs pytest for unit and integration tests
assertions.evidence: Phase 3 runs 'uv run pytest tests/unit -q' and 'uv run pytest tests/integration -q'

assertions.text: Creates tasks to track pipeline phases
assertions.evidence: No TaskCreate calls mentioned. Phases tracked via walkthrough structure, not task tool.

assertions.text: Checks for migration files in supabase/migrations/
assertions.evidence: Phase 1 flags untracked migration file, Phase 4 triggered and fully executed with MCP tools

assertions.text: Attempts to create a git commit with structured message
assertions.evidence: Phase 6 creates commit with conventional commit format ('feat: ...') and HEREDOC

assertions.text: Attempts to create a PR using gh pr create
assertions.evidence: Phase 7 uses 'gh pr create' with quality gate checklist in PR body

assertions.text: Attempts deployment to Cloud Run and Vercel
assertions.evidence: Phase 11 deploys to Cloud Run (canary 10%->50%->100%) and Vercel (vercel --prod)
